2603.26380.title: Switch Attention: Towards Dynamic and Fine-grained Hybrid Transformers
2603.26380.paper_summary: The attention mechanism has been the core component in modern transformer architectures. However, the computation of standard full attention scales quadratically with the sequence length, serving as a major bottleneck in long-context language modeling. Sliding window attention restricts the context length for better efficiency at the cost of narrower receptive fields. While existing efforts attempt to take the benefits from both sides by building hybrid models, they often resort to static, heuristically designed alternating patterns that limit efficient allocation of computation in various scenarios. In this paper, we propose Switch Attention (SwiAttn), a novel hybrid transformer that enables dynamic and fine-grained routing between full attention and sliding window attention. For each token at each transformer layer, SwiAttn dynamically routes the computation to either a full-attention branch for global information aggregation or a sliding-window branch for efficient local pattern matching. An adaptive regularization objective is designed to encourage the model towards efficiency. Moreover, we adopt continual pretraining to optimize the model, transferring the full attention architecture to the hybrid one. Extensive experiments are conducted on twenty-three benchmark datasets across both regular (4K) and long (32K) context lengths, demonstrating the effectiveness of the proposed method.
2603.26380.paper_summary_zh: 注意力機制是現代Transformer架構的核心組件。<lb/>然而，標準的全注意力計算隨著序列長度呈平方級增長，成為長上下文語言建模中的主要瓶頸。<lb/>滑動窗口注意力限制了上下文長度，以提高效率，但代價是接收域變窄。<lb/>雖然現有的努力試圖通過構建混合模型來同時獲取兩者的優勢，但它們往往依賴靜態、啟發式設計的交替模式，限制了在各種場景中計算的有效分配。<lb/>在本文中，我們提出了Switch Attention (SwiAttn)，這是一種新穎的混合Transformer，能夠在全注意力和滑動窗口注意力之間實現動態和細粒度的路由。<lb/>對於每個Transformer層中的每個標記，SwiAttn動態地將計算路由到全注意力分支以進行全局信息聚合，或路由到滑動窗口分支以進行高效的局部模式匹配。<lb/>設計了一個自適應正則化目標，以促使模型朝向效率發展。<lb/>此外，我們採用持續預訓練來優化模型，將全注意力架構轉換為混合架構。<lb/>在二十三個基準數據集上進行了廣泛的實驗，涵蓋常規（4K）和長（32K）上下文長度，證明了所提方法的有效性。
2603.26380.author: Yusheng Zhao et.al.
2603.26380.authors: Yusheng Zhao, Hourun Li, Bohan Wu, Jingyang Yuan, Meng Zhang, Yichun Yin, Lifeng Shang, Ming Zhang
